title: Noega and Esnova
description: Esnova (Esnova Racks S.A.) is a leading Spanish manufacturer specializing in industrial shelving and warehouse storage systems. Based in Gijón, Asturias, the company designs, manufactures, and installs solutions for logistics and warehouse management across more than 35 countries. Noega Systems is a specialized industrial company that designs, manufactures, and installs metal racking and storage solutions. Founded in 2010 and headquartered in Gijón, Spain, the firm provides end-to-end intralogistics services, including technical inspections (ITE) and automated warehouse planning.
